name: Klubhuis
overview: Klubhuis takes viewers on a journey to the heart of the local rugby world; there where cameras rarely - if ever - come, where grass fields are a luxury and the values ​​of rugby - teamwork, discipline and respect - unite communities on and especially off the field.

trailers.title: Amptelike Lokprent: Klubhuis - 'n nuwe Dokumentêre Reeks | S1 | kykNET
